rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The diff contained only task metadata files (`.kody/tasks/`), not the actual source code. Files must be created on disk, not just planned.","scope":"implementation scope"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When Glob confirms 0 results for expected files like `src/utils/hash-password.ts`, the previous step did no real work — start fresh rather than trying to iterate on its output.","scope":"task workflow"}]}
